hub_subtitle: Business English para Gestão de Riscos e Finanças

lesson.menu_title: Back in the Room — Who Is Sergio?
lesson.menu_desc: Reactivation & introducing your role at the risk desk -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 1 -- Reactivation & Introducing Your Role at XP
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Sergio Takashi Tanaka | Lesson 1 -- Reactivation

listenings.text: Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the weekly risk committee. We start at nine o'clock in the main meeting room. Today we review the market risk report, the new exposure limits, and the questions from the regulator. Each team leader presents the numbers for their desk. Please have your reports ready and share any open issues before the end of the call. Thank you, and let's have a productive meeting.

Hi Sergio, this is Rachel from the London partner bank. It was good to meet you on the call today. I'm sending you the updated exposure figures this afternoon, and I'd like to schedule a short meeting next week to discuss the numbers. Are you available on Tuesday morning? I really want to understand how your team assesses these risks. Talk soon, and have a great day.

extra_audio.text: Sergio joins the risk meeting and says good morning. He introduces himself and his role at XP. He explains that he manages financial risk. Rachel asks a question about the exposure report. Sergio answers and they agree to talk again next week.
